name: privacyquant
description: Versioned statutory knowledge graph for US state consumer privacy laws. Exposes 18 MCP tools covering applicability analysis, multi-state compliance ceiling synthesis, DPA clause review and drafting (LLM-backed and deterministic), privacy notice drafting, DSAR routing and workflow, enforcement precedent research, risk scoring, legislative monitoring, citation auditing, and DOCX memo deliverable generation. Covers CCPA/CPRA, VCDPA, CPA, CTDPA, UCPA, TDPSA, OCPA, MCDPA, ICDPA, INCDPA, TIPA, DPDPA, NJDPA, NHDPA, NDPA, KCDPA, MODPA, MCDPA-MN, RIDTPPA, and FDBR across 146 atomic requirement nodes.
